description_long: This is a small, stylized yacht with a white and brown hull, featuring a single tall mast and two large triangular white sails. The hull is blocky and rectangular, with a flat deck and a series of square portholes along the side. The bow and stern are both squared off, and the deck is bordered by small yellow posts that may represent cleats or lights. The yacht sits on a blue base, simulating water, and has minimal visible deck equipment. The mast is centrally positioned, and the sails are symmetrically arranged on either side. The overall design is simple and geometric, with a focus on clear, contrasting colors and basic nautical features.
description: A small, blocky yacht with a white and brown hull, tall central mast, and two large white sails, set on a blue water-like base. The design is geometric and stylized, with minimal deck details and yellow accent posts.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the yacht, both sails, the white and brown hull, and yellow posts along the deck.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the bow, central mast, and the narrow profile of the hull and sails.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the hull, sails, and deck features from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stern, mast, and the blocky structure of the hull.
attribute_hull_design: Monohull with a flat bottom and squared bow and stern, featuring a white upper section and brown lower section, with a row of square portholes along the side and no visible keel or chines.
attribute_deck_layout: Single-level flat deck bordered by small yellow posts, with a centrally positioned mast and no visible cockpit, walkways, or seating areas; deck equipment is minimal and stylized.
attribute_cabin_structure: No visible cabin structure; the deck is open and flat with no raised superstructure, windows, or doors apparent.
